cardHub.pageDescription: Explore every card in the Rider-Waite-Smith deck with AI-powered narrative interpretations. Upright and reversed meanings, love, career, and yes/no guidance for all 78 cards.
cardHub.majorArcanaDesc: 22 trump cards representing life's major themes and spiritual lessons.
cardHub.suitOfWandsDesc: Fire element — creativity, passion, ambition, and willpower.
cardHub.suitOfCupsDesc: Water element — emotions, relationships, intuition, and love.
cardHub.suitOfSwordsDesc: Air element — intellect, conflict, truth, and communication.
cardHub.suitOfPentaclesDesc: Earth element — material wealth, career, health, and stability.
cardHub.faqQ1: How many tarot cards are there?
cardHub.faqA1: A standard tarot deck contains 78 cards: 22 Major Arcana cards representing major life themes, and 56 Minor Arcana cards divided into four suits (Wands, Cups, Swords, and Pentacles) that reflect day-to-day experiences.
cardHub.faqQ2: What is the difference between Major and Minor Arcana?
cardHub.faqA2: Major Arcana cards represent significant life events, spiritual lessons, and deep archetypal themes. Minor Arcana cards deal with everyday situations and temporary influences. Both are equally important in a reading.
cardHub.faqQ3: What does a reversed tarot card mean?
cardHub.faqA3: A reversed card appears upside-down in a spread. It often signals blocked energy, internalized qualities, or a need to look at the card's theme from a different angle — not simply the opposite of its upright meaning.
cardHub.faqQ4: Can AI read tarot cards accurately?
cardHub.faqA4: AI tarot readings use advanced language models to provide insightful, nuanced interpretations based on card symbolism and position. While not mystical, they offer a powerful tool for self-reflection and exploring different perspectives on your situation.
cardHub.faqQ5: Which tarot card is the most powerful?
cardHub.faqA5: No single card is "most powerful." However, Major Arcana cards like The Tower, Death, and The World carry significant weight in readings due to their transformative themes. Every card has its own unique power depending on context.
cardHub.faqQ6: Do you need to be psychic to read tarot?
cardHub.faqA6: No. Tarot is a tool for structured self-reflection, not a psychic ability. Anyone can learn to read tarot by understanding card symbolism and developing their intuitive interpretation skills over time.
cardHub.ctaDescription: Get a free AI tarot reading and experience how these cards weave together into your unique story.

about.introP1: TarotVeil is an AI-powered tarot reading platform that does something most tarot apps don't: it tells a story. Instead of showing you isolated card meanings, TarotVeil weaves all the cards in your spread into one cohesive narrative, revealing how they connect and what they mean together in the context of your question.
about.howItWorksP1: Every reading begins with a cryptographically random card draw. TarotVeil uses the Web Crypto API with a Fisher-Yates shuffle, the same randomization standard used in security applications. No predetermined outcomes, no patterns, no tricks — just genuine randomness that mirrors the physical act of shuffling a real deck.
about.howItWorksP2: Once your cards are drawn, AI interprets them as a unified reading. Not card-by-card definitions pulled from a database, but a flowing narrative that considers the positions, combinations, and relationships between every card in your spread. You can then ask follow-up questions to explore the reading further, creating a conversation with depth that goes beyond surface-level interpretations.
about.approachP1: We treat tarot as a tool for self-reflection, not fortune-telling. TarotVeil will never tell you what will happen. Instead, it invites you to consider perspectives, patterns, and possibilities you might not have seen on your own. The cards act as a mirror, and the AI helps you interpret what you see.
about.approachP2: We respect the cultural and symbolic depth of the tarot tradition, particularly the Rider-Waite-Smith imagery that forms the foundation of modern tarot practice. Our interpretations draw from established tarot symbolism while remaining grounded in practical, psychologically informed guidance.
about.privacyP1: Your readings are yours. TarotVeil does not share your questions, cards, or interpretations with anyone. We don't make medical, legal, or financial claims about tarot readings. We don't use manipulative design patterns to push purchases, and our free tier provides genuine, complete readings — not teasers designed to upsell.
about.singleCardDesc: Quick daily guidance or a focused answer
about.multiLangP1: TarotVeil supports readings in English and Farsi (Persian), with culturally adapted interpretations — not just translations, but meaning that resonates within each language's cultural context.
about.ctaDescription: Get a free AI tarot reading and see how your cards weave together into a story.
about.exploreLink: Want to learn what each card means?

legal.privacy1Content: When you create an account, we collect your email address and authentication credentials. When you use our tarot reading service, we store your reading history including cards drawn, spread type, and AI-generated interpretations. Card draws use client-side cryptographic randomness and are not influenced by any server-side data.
legal.privacy2Content: We use your information to provide and improve our tarot reading service, manage your subscription, and communicate service updates. Your readings are private and never shared with third parties. We do not sell your personal data.
legal.privacy3Content: Your data is stored securely on Supabase (PostgreSQL) with row-level security policies. Authentication is handled through Supabase Auth. Payment information is processed and stored by Stripe — we never see or store your full card details.
legal.privacy4Content: We use the following third-party services: Supabase (database and authentication), Stripe (payment processing), Anthropic (AI interpretation), Vercel (hosting and analytics), and PostHog (product analytics). Each service has its own privacy policy governing their handling of data.
legal.privacy5Content: You can access, update, or delete your account and reading history at any time through your settings page. To request complete data deletion, contact us at privacy@tarotveil.com.
legal.privacy6Content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. Analytics cookies (Vercel Analytics, PostHog) help us understand how our service is used. You can disable non-essential cookies in your browser settings.
legal.privacy7Content: For privacy-related questions, contact us at privacy@tarotveil.com.
legal.terms1Content: TarotVeil is an AI-powered tarot reading platform that provides narrative interpretations of tarot card spreads. Our service is for entertainment and personal reflection purposes only. Readings should not be used as a substitute for professional advice in medical, legal, financial, or psychological matters.
legal.terms2Content: You may use a limited free reading without an account. To access full features, you must create an account with a valid email address. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
legal.terms3Content: Paid plans (Pro and Premium) are billed monthly through Stripe. You can cancel your subscription at any time through the billing page or Stripe customer portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.
legal.terms4Content: Free accounts are limited to 1 single-card reading per day and 1 three-card reading per week. Paid plans offer unlimited readings as described on our pricing page. We reserve the right to limit excessive automated usage.
legal.terms5Content: AI-generated reading interpretations are provided for your personal use. The TarotVeil brand, design, and platform code are proprietary. Tarot card imagery used is from the public domain Rider-Waite-Smith deck.
legal.terms6Content: TarotVeil provides AI-generated tarot readings for entertainment purposes. We make no claims of supernatural ability or predictive accuracy. Card draws use cryptographic randomness and are not influenced by any external factors. The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.
legal.terms7Content: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@tarotveil.com.

landing.faqQ1: How does AI tarot reading work?
landing.faqA1: TarotVeil uses cryptographically random card draws combined with advanced AI to read all your cards together as one cohesive narrative — not isolated per-card templates. The AI considers every card, its position, and your question to weave a personalized story.
landing.faqQ2: Are the tarot cards truly random?
landing.faqA2: Yes. We use the Web Crypto API with a Fisher-Yates shuffle algorithm, providing cryptographic-grade randomness that is verifiable, fair, and truly random — the same standard used in security applications.
landing.faqQ3: Can I ask follow-up questions about my reading?
landing.faqA3: Yes. Pro users get 5 follow-up questions per reading, and Premium users get 10. The AI maintains full context of your spread, cards, and narrative for deeper exploration.
landing.faqA4: TarotVeil currently supports English and Farsi, with Arabic coming soon. Our readings are culturally native — not just translated — offering depth that resonates with each language's traditions.
landing.faqA5: Yes! You can try a free three-card reading right now — no signup required. Create a free account to save readings, ask follow-up questions, and access your reading history. No credit card required.

spreadsHub.metaTitle: Tarot Spreads Guide — AI Tarot Spread Layouts | TarotVeil
spreadsHub.metaDescription: Learn the most popular tarot spreads: Single Card, Three-Card, and Celtic Cross. Step-by-step guides with position meanings and AI-powered sample readings.
spreadsHub.ogTitle: Tarot Spreads Guide — AI Tarot Spread Layouts | TarotVeil
spreadsHub.ogDescription: Master the most popular tarot spreads with step-by-step guides, position meanings, and AI-powered interpretations.
spreadsHub.pageSubtitle: Choose the right spread for your question. From quick daily pulls to deep 10-card readings, each layout reveals a different dimension of your story.
spreadsHub.spreadSingleCardDesc: A focused pull for quick clarity. Perfect for daily guidance, yes/no questions, or when you need a single clear message.
spreadsHub.spreadThreeCardDesc: The classic Past–Present–Future arc. See where you’ve been, where you stand, and what lies ahead in one cohesive narrative.
spreadsHub.spreadCelticCrossDesc: The most comprehensive tarot layout. Ten cards reveal your situation from every angle — past influences, hidden fears, external forces, and the likely outcome.
spreadsHub.spreadHorseshoeDesc: The #1 middle-ground spread for decision-making. Seven cards trace a clear arc from past influences to likely outcome — perfect for "What should I do?" questions.
spreadsHub.faqQ1: Which tarot spread should I use?
spreadsHub.faqA1: Start with a Single Card for quick daily guidance or yes/no questions. Use the Three-Card Spread for past-present-future narratives. Choose the Celtic Cross when you need a comprehensive, multi-angle analysis of a complex situation.
spreadsHub.faqQ2: Do I need experience to use these spreads?
spreadsHub.faqA2: Not at all. TarotVeil's AI interprets every spread for you, weaving the cards into a cohesive narrative. The Single Card and Three-Card spreads are perfect for beginners, while the Celtic Cross offers deeper insights as you grow.
spreadsHub.faqQ3: How does AI tarot interpretation differ from traditional reading?
spreadsHub.faqA3: Our AI reads all your cards together as one story — not isolated meanings. It considers card positions, relationships between cards, and the overall narrative arc to give you a reading that feels personal and cohesive.
spreadsHub.ctaDescription: Get a free AI tarot reading and see how the cards weave together into your unique story.

spreadSingleCard.metaTitle: Single Card Tarot Reading — One Card Pull Guide | AI Tarot
spreadSingleCard.metaDescription: Learn how to do a single card tarot reading. Perfect for daily guidance, yes/no questions, and quick clarity. Try a free AI one-card reading at TarotVeil.
spreadSingleCard.ogTitle: Single Card Tarot Reading — One Card Pull Guide | AI Tarot
spreadSingleCard.ogDescription: Master the single card tarot reading. Quick guidance, daily pulls, and yes/no answers with AI-powered interpretations.
spreadSingleCard.heroDescription: The simplest and most direct way to consult the tarot. One card, one message. Whether you're starting your morning, facing a decision, or just checking in with yourself, a single card pull cuts through noise and delivers focused insight.
spreadSingleCard.ctaButton: Try a Free Single Card Reading
spreadSingleCard.whenToUseTitle: When to Use a Single Card Reading
spreadSingleCard.useDailyDesc: Pull a card each morning to set your intention for the day. Many tarot practitioners make this a daily ritual.
spreadSingleCard.useClarityDesc: When you need immediate insight on a situation but don't have time for a full spread.
spreadSingleCard.useYesNoDesc: Frame a binary question. Upright cards tend toward "yes" and reversed cards toward "no" — but the nuance matters.
spreadSingleCard.useLearningDesc: The best way to learn tarot card meanings is to pull one card daily and sit with its message.
spreadSingleCard.step1Desc: Take a breath. Think about what you want to know — or simply ask "what do I need to know today?" The clearer your intention, the more resonant the reading.
spreadSingleCard.step2Desc: TarotVeil uses cryptographic randomization (the same technology that secures banking systems) to draw your card. No algorithms, no bias — just pure chance.
spreadSingleCard.step3Desc: Our AI doesn't just give you a textbook definition. It reads the card in context — considering the position (upright or reversed), your question, and the card's narrative arc — to deliver a personal, meaningful interpretation.
spreadSingleCard.positionP1: In a single card reading, the card represents the core message for your question. It's not filtered through multiple positions or compared against other cards — it stands alone as the tarot's direct answer.
spreadSingleCard.positionP2: This directness is what makes the single card pull so powerful. There's nowhere for the meaning to hide. The card you draw is the card you need.
spreadSingleCard.sampleText: After the upheaval of The Tower, The Star arrives as quiet reassurance — you are exactly where you need to be. This card speaks of renewed hope after a difficult period. Whatever you've been weathering, the worst has passed. The Star invites you to trust the process, pour your energy into healing, and believe that clarity is emerging. This isn't blind optimism; it's the calm confidence that comes after surviving something hard and realizing you're still standing.
spreadSingleCard.tipsTitle: Tips for Better Single Card Readings
spreadSingleCard.tip1: Be specific with your question. "What should I focus on at work today?" is more powerful than "tell me about work."
spreadSingleCard.tip2: Don't re-draw if you don't like the answer. The first card is the message — sit with it.
spreadSingleCard.tip3: Journal your daily pulls. Patterns will emerge over time that reveal deeper insights.
spreadSingleCard.tip4: Pay attention to reversed cards. They're not "bad" — they often indicate internal or blocked energy.
spreadSingleCard.tip5: Use follow-up questions. On TarotVeil, you can ask the AI to elaborate on any part of your reading.
spreadSingleCard.relatedThreeCardDesc: Past, present, and future in one narrative arc.
spreadSingleCard.relatedCelticCrossDesc: 10 cards for a comprehensive, deep reading.
spreadSingleCard.learnDesc: Deepen your readings by understanding each card's meaning.
spreadSingleCard.bottomCtaDesc: Get a free AI tarot reading with a single card pull. No signup required — just focus your question and draw.

spreadThreeCard.metaTitle: Three-Card Tarot Spread — Past, Present, Future | AI Tarot
spreadThreeCard.metaDescription: Learn the three-card tarot spread: past, present, and future positions explained. Step-by-step guide with AI-powered sample reading. Try it free at TarotVeil.
spreadThreeCard.ogTitle: Three-Card Tarot Spread — Past, Present, Future | AI Tarot
spreadThreeCard.ogDescription: Master the three-card tarot spread. Past, present, and future positions with AI-powered narrative interpretations.
spreadThreeCard.heroDescription: The most popular tarot layout in the world — and for good reason. Three cards create a complete story: where you've been, where you are, and where you're heading. Simple enough for beginners, deep enough for experienced readers.
spreadThreeCard.layoutCaption: Cards are laid left to right: Past → Present → Future
spreadThreeCard.pastMeaning: What has led you to this moment. The past position reveals the foundation of your current situation — the choices, events, and energies that shaped where you are now.
spreadThreeCard.presentMeaning: Where you stand right now. The present position shows your current state — your mindset, the energies surrounding you, and the central theme of this moment in your life.
spreadThreeCard.futureMeaning: What is unfolding ahead of you. The future position isn't fixed fate — it shows the most likely trajectory based on your current path and energies. It can be influenced by your choices.
spreadThreeCard.pastSample: The Eight of Cups in your past tells of a deliberate departure — something you walked away from, even though part of you wanted to stay. This wasn't impulsive; it was the quiet realization that what you had wasn't enough anymore.
spreadThreeCard.presentSample: The Hermit confirms you're in a period of intentional solitude and introspection. This isn't loneliness — it's withdrawal by choice. You're searching for answers that can only be found by going inward.
spreadThreeCard.futureSample: The Ace of Pentacles ahead signals a tangible new beginning — a job offer, a creative project taking root, or a financial opportunity materializing. The introspection of The Hermit is leading you toward something real and grounded.
spreadThreeCard.howAIP1: Traditional tarot readers interpret each card separately, then try to synthesize a story. TarotVeil's AI works differently — it reads all three cards simultaneously, finding the narrative thread that connects them.
spreadThreeCard.howAIP2: The result is a cohesive story, not three disconnected meanings. You'll see how your past influences your present, and how your present choices are shaping the future the cards reveal.
spreadThreeCard.howAIP3: After your initial reading, you can ask up to 5 follow-up questions to explore specific cards or themes deeper — something no traditional deck can offer.
spreadThreeCard.whenTip1: You're in a period of transition and want to understand the trajectory.
spreadThreeCard.whenTip2: You need more context than a single card but don't want a full Celtic Cross.
spreadThreeCard.whenTip3: You're facing a decision and want to see how it connects to your past and future.
spreadThreeCard.whenTip4: You're new to tarot and want a structured but accessible reading.
spreadThreeCard.whenTip5: You want a reading that tells a story, not just lists meanings.
spreadThreeCard.variationsIntro: While Past–Present–Future is the classic, you can frame the same three positions differently depending on your question:
spreadThreeCard.varMindBodySpiritDesc: Understand how an issue is affecting you on different levels.
spreadThreeCard.varSituationActionOutcomeDesc: Get practical advice: what's happening, what to do, what to expect.
spreadThreeCard.varYouThemRelationshipDesc: A focused lens for relationship questions and dynamics.
spreadThreeCard.varOptionAOptionBAdviceDesc: Compare two choices side by side with guidance for deciding.
spreadThreeCard.relatedSingleCardDesc: One card, one message. Quick daily guidance.
spreadThreeCard.relatedCelticCrossDesc: 10 cards for the most comprehensive reading.
spreadThreeCard.relatedCardMeaningsDesc: Learn what every card means — upright, reversed, and in context.
spreadThreeCard.bottomCtaDesc: Get a free AI tarot reading with the past–present–future spread. See how three cards weave together into your unique story.

spreadCelticCross.metaTitle: Celtic Cross Tarot Spread — 10-Card Layout Guide | AI Tarot
spreadCelticCross.metaDescription: Master the Celtic Cross tarot spread: all 10 positions explained with meanings, tips, and an AI-powered sample reading. The most comprehensive tarot layout.
spreadCelticCross.ogTitle: Celtic Cross Tarot Spread — 10-Card Layout Guide | AI Tarot
spreadCelticCross.ogDescription: The definitive guide to the Celtic Cross tarot spread. All 10 positions explained with AI-powered interpretations.
spreadCelticCross.heroDescription: The Celtic Cross is the most iconic and comprehensive tarot spread in existence. Ten cards arranged in a cross and staff formation reveal your situation from every angle — conscious desires, hidden fears, external pressures, and the trajectory of events. When you need the full picture, this is the spread.
spreadCelticCross.layoutCaption: The Cross (positions 1–6) reveals the situation. The Staff (positions 7–10) reveals the deeper context and outcome.
spreadCelticCross.pos1Desc: Your current situation and state of mind. This is the heart of the reading — the central theme that everything else revolves around.
spreadCelticCross.pos2Desc: The immediate obstacle or opposing force. This card crosses the first, literally representing what stands in your way. It's not always negative — sometimes the "challenge" is an abundance of options or a fear of success.
spreadCelticCross.pos3Desc: The root cause — the deeper, often subconscious basis of the situation. This card reveals what's underneath the surface, the foundation your current reality is built on.
spreadCelticCross.pos4Desc: Events from the recent past that are directly influencing the present. These aren't ancient history — they're the choices and circumstances from the last weeks or months that set the stage.
spreadCelticCross.pos5Desc: Your conscious goal — what you're aspiring toward or believe is the best possible outcome. Sometimes this card reveals that what you think you want differs from what the cards suggest you need.
spreadCelticCross.pos6Desc: What's coming in the near term — the next few weeks. This isn't the final outcome but the next chapter. Understanding this position helps you prepare and make informed choices.
spreadCelticCross.pos7Desc: How you see yourself in this situation — your internal state, attitude, and the role you're playing. This card often reveals blind spots about your own behavior or self-perception.
spreadCelticCross.pos8Desc: External influences — how others see you, social dynamics, workplace energy, or family pressures. This is the context you can't fully control but need to navigate.
spreadCelticCross.pos9Desc: Your deepest hopes and hidden fears — which are often two sides of the same coin. What you most want is frequently what you most fear, and this card illuminates that tension.
spreadCelticCross.pos10Desc: The likely outcome based on the current path. This isn't destiny — it's trajectory. The other nine cards show you why this outcome is forming, and where you might redirect your energy if you choose.
spreadCelticCross.howAITitle: How AI Interprets the Celtic Cross
spreadCelticCross.howAIP1: The Celtic Cross is where AI tarot reading truly shines. A human reader must hold 10 cards and their interactions in mind simultaneously — a cognitive challenge even for experienced practitioners. Our AI processes all 10 positions at once, finding patterns and narrative threads that connect every card.
spreadCelticCross.howAIP2: You'll see how the Foundation card echoes in the Outcome, how your Hopes & Fears might be blocking what the Crown position shows you want, and how the Environment is shaping forces you can't see directly. It's not 10 separate readings — it's one integrated story told from 10 perspectives.
spreadCelticCross.howAIP3: With up to 10 follow-up questions on Premium, you can drill into any card or explore how changing your approach might shift the Outcome card's trajectory.
spreadCelticCross.sampleDesc: Here's what a Celtic Cross reading might look like. Each card links to its full meaning page.
spreadCelticCross.tip1: Use this spread for complex situations that need multi-angle analysis, not quick yes/no questions.
spreadCelticCross.tip2: Pay special attention to the relationship between positions 1 (Present) and 10 (Outcome) — they tell you where you are and where you're heading.
spreadCelticCross.tip3: The Challenge card (position 2) isn't your enemy. It often represents a growth edge or an energy you need to integrate.
spreadCelticCross.tip4: Compare positions 5 (Crown/aspirations) and 9 (Hopes & Fears). When they conflict, you've found the core tension.
spreadCelticCross.tip5: Use follow-up questions to explore connections between specific cards — "How does my Foundation card affect the Outcome?"
spreadCelticCross.tip6: Don't rush it. The Celtic Cross rewards contemplation. Sit with the reading before acting on it.
spreadCelticCross.relatedSingleCardDesc: Quick daily guidance with one focused card.
spreadCelticCross.relatedThreeCardDesc: Past, present, and future in one narrative arc.
spreadCelticCross.learnDesc: The Celtic Cross uses 10 of the 78 cards. Understanding each card's meaning deepens your reading experience.
spreadCelticCross.bottomCtaDesc: Get an AI-powered Celtic Cross reading and see 10 cards woven into one comprehensive story about your situation.

spreadHorseshoe.metaTitle: Horseshoe Tarot Spread — 7-Card Decision Making Layout | AI Tarot
spreadHorseshoe.metaDescription: Learn the horseshoe tarot spread: 7 cards tracing an arc from past influences to likely outcome. The best spread for decision-making and "What should I do?" questions. Try it at TarotVeil.
spreadHorseshoe.ogTitle: Horseshoe Tarot Spread — 7-Card Decision Making Layout | AI Tarot
spreadHorseshoe.ogDescription: Master the horseshoe tarot spread. Seven cards form a narrative arc for decision-making with AI-powered interpretations.
spreadHorseshoe.heroDescription: The #1 middle-ground spread for decision-making. Seven cards trace a clear arc from past influences through hidden factors and obstacles to the likely outcome — reading like a mini-story that's perfect for "What should I do?" questions.
spreadHorseshoe.layoutCaption: Cards form a horseshoe arc: past on the left, future on the right, with hidden factors and obstacles at the base
spreadHorseshoe.pos1Meaning: What past events have shaped this situation. This position reveals the foundation — the experiences, choices, and transitions that brought you to this crossroads.
spreadHorseshoe.pos1Sample: The Six of Swords shows you've already been through a difficult transition. You left troubled waters behind, carrying lessons from that journey. This wasn't easy, but it was necessary — and it's given you a clarity you didn't have before.
spreadHorseshoe.pos2Meaning: Where you stand right now. Your current state of mind, the energies surrounding you, and the central theme of this moment.
spreadHorseshoe.pos2Sample: The Two of Wands confirms you're standing at a decision point, literally holding the world in your hands. You have options, and you know it. The restlessness you feel isn't anxiety — it's ambition wanting a direction.
spreadHorseshoe.pos3Meaning: Subconscious influences you may not be aware of. What's happening beneath the surface — fears, intuitions, or patterns that are quietly shaping your choices.
spreadHorseshoe.pos3Sample: The Moon reveals that your subconscious is stirring with unresolved fears. Something from a past experience is casting shadows over this decision — not facts, but feelings. Trust your intuition here, but verify it against reality.
spreadHorseshoe.pos4Meaning: Your attitude and how you're handling this situation. The energy you're bringing to the decision — whether it's serving you or holding you back.
spreadHorseshoe.pos4Sample: The Knight of Pentacles says you're approaching this methodically and carefully. You're not rushing — you're building a plan. This patience is a strength, but be careful it doesn't become paralysis disguised as preparation.
spreadHorseshoe.pos5Meaning: Challenges and blockages you face. What's standing between you and clarity — whether internal resistance or external circumstances.
spreadHorseshoe.pos5Sample: The Five of Cups points to grief over what you might lose by choosing. You're focused on the cups that have spilled — the opportunities you'd leave behind. But behind you stand two full cups you haven't turned to see yet.
spreadHorseshoe.pos6Meaning: People and circumstances affecting the outcome. The environment, other people's expectations, and forces beyond your direct control.
spreadHorseshoe.pos6Sample: The Emperor suggests an authority figure — a mentor, boss, or institution — whose structure and expectations are influencing your decision. Their stability could be supportive scaffolding or a rigid constraint, depending on how you engage with it.
spreadHorseshoe.pos7Meaning: Where this path leads if you stay the course. The most probable outcome based on the current trajectory and energies.
spreadHorseshoe.pos7Sample: The Chariot is a powerful outcome — victory through willpower and determination. If you channel the methodical energy of the Knight of Pentacles and confront the fears The Moon revealed, you'll move forward with unstoppable momentum. The decision resolves in your favor, but only if you actually make it.
spreadHorseshoe.howAIP1: The horseshoe's strength is its narrative progression. Seven positions tell a complete story: what shaped this moment, where you stand, what's hidden, how you're approaching it, what's blocking you, who's influencing the outcome, and where it all leads.
spreadHorseshoe.howAIP2: TarotVeil's AI reads all seven cards as one cohesive narrative — weaving connections between the hidden factors (position 3) and the obstacles (position 5), showing how your approach (position 4) either overcomes or reinforces the challenges ahead.
spreadHorseshoe.howAIP3: After your initial reading, Pro members can ask up to 5 follow-up questions to explore specific cards, dive deeper into the obstacles, or ask "What if I change my approach?"
spreadHorseshoe.whenTip1: You're facing a decision and want to understand all the factors before choosing.
spreadHorseshoe.whenTip2: You want more depth than a three-card spread but less complexity than the Celtic Cross.
spreadHorseshoe.whenTip3: You're asking "What should I do?" or "Which path should I take?"
spreadHorseshoe.whenTip4: You suspect hidden influences or subconscious patterns are affecting your choices.
spreadHorseshoe.whenTip5: You want to understand both internal obstacles and external forces at play.
spreadHorseshoe.whenTip6: You need a reading that tells a clear progression story from cause to outcome.
spreadHorseshoe.relatedThreeCardDesc: Past, present, future — the classic narrative arc.
spreadHorseshoe.relatedCelticCrossDesc: 10 cards for the most comprehensive reading.
spreadHorseshoe.bottomCtaDesc: Get an AI tarot reading with the 7-card horseshoe spread. See how seven cards weave together into your decision-making story.

loveTarot.metaTitle: Love Tarot Reading — AI Relationship & Love Guidance
loveTarot.metaDescription: Get a free AI love tarot reading for relationship guidance. Explore romantic connections, compatibility, and emotional clarity with narrative tarot interpretations.
loveTarot.ogTitle: Love Tarot Reading — AI Relationship & Love Guidance | TarotVeil
loveTarot.ogDescription: AI-powered love tarot readings that explore your romantic life with narrative depth. Free readings available.
loveTarot.heroDescription: Whether you are navigating a new connection, deepening an existing relationship, or healing from heartbreak, a love tarot reading illuminates the emotional currents shaping your romantic life. Our AI reads all your cards together, weaving them into a narrative about your love story — not just isolated card meanings.
loveTarot.revealsTitle: What a Love Tarot Reading Reveals
loveTarot.revealDynamicsDesc: Understand the energy between you and your partner. Are you aligned or pulling in different directions? What unspoken patterns are at play?
loveTarot.revealBlocksDesc: Identify fears, past wounds, or self-sabotaging patterns that may be preventing you from fully opening up to love.
loveTarot.revealCompatibilityDesc: Explore how your energies interact with a potential or current partner. The cards reveal shared strengths and areas of friction.
loveTarot.revealTrajectoryDesc: See where your relationship is heading based on current patterns. Not fixed fate — but the path you are on if nothing changes.
loveTarot.questionsTitle: Questions to Ask in a Love Reading
loveTarot.questionsIntro: The most powerful love readings come from open-ended questions that invite insight rather than demanding a yes/no answer:
loveTarot.q1: What energy is shaping my love life right now?
loveTarot.q2: What do I need to understand about my current relationship?
loveTarot.q3: What is blocking me from finding the connection I want?
loveTarot.q4: How can I strengthen the bond with my partner?
loveTarot.q5: What should I know before entering this new relationship?
loveTarot.q6: What lesson is this heartbreak trying to teach me?
loveTarot.keyCardsDesc: While every card can appear in a love reading, these cards carry particularly strong romantic significance:
loveTarot.bestSpreadThreeCardDesc: Frame it as You / Them / The Relationship — or Past / Present / Future of your love life. Simple and powerful.
loveTarot.bestSpreadCelticCrossDesc: For complex relationship situations. Ten cards reveal hidden fears, external influences, and the likely trajectory of your love life.
loveTarot.sampleQuestion: Question: “What do I need to understand about my current relationship?”
loveTarot.sampleText: The Two of Cups at the foundation confirms a genuine, reciprocal connection — this relationship started from a place of mutual recognition. But The Moon in the present reveals that something important remains unspoken. There are feelings, fears, or truths that neither of you has surfaced yet. This is not deception — it is the natural fog that settles when vulnerability feels risky. The Ten of Pentacles ahead suggests that if you can navigate through this uncertainty with honesty, the relationship has the foundation for something lasting and deeply secure.
loveTarot.faqQ1: Can tarot predict my love life?
loveTarot.faqA1: Tarot does not predict a fixed future. It reveals patterns, energies, and dynamics in your romantic life — helping you understand what influences your relationships and what you might consider going forward. Think of it as a mirror, not a crystal ball.
loveTarot.faqQ2: What is the best tarot spread for love questions?
loveTarot.faqA2: The Three-Card Spread works well for relationship trajectory (past/present/future or you/them/the relationship). For deeper analysis, the Celtic Cross reveals hidden influences, fears, and likely outcomes.
loveTarot.faqQ3: How does AI love tarot differ from traditional?
loveTarot.faqA3: Our AI reads all your cards together as one relationship narrative rather than giving isolated meanings. It finds patterns between cards and weaves them into a cohesive story about your romantic situation — then you can ask follow-up questions to explore specific aspects.
loveTarot.bottomCtaDesc: Get a free AI love tarot reading. Ask about your relationship, compatibility, or what the cards see ahead for your romantic life.
loveTarot.exploreLink: Want to learn what each card means?

careerTarot.metaTitle: Career Tarot Reading — AI Work & Career Guidance
careerTarot.metaDescription: Get a free AI career tarot reading. Explore career decisions, job changes, workplace dynamics, and professional growth with narrative tarot interpretations.
careerTarot.ogTitle: Career Tarot Reading — AI Work & Career Guidance | TarotVeil
careerTarot.ogDescription: AI-powered career tarot readings for work decisions, job changes, and professional growth.
careerTarot.heroDescription: Facing a job change, navigating office politics, or wondering if you are on the right professional path? A career tarot reading helps you step back and see the bigger picture. Our AI reads your cards as a cohesive narrative about your work life — revealing patterns, blockers, and opportunities you might not see from the inside.
careerTarot.revealJobDesc: Should you stay or go? Accept the offer or negotiate? The cards illuminate factors you might be overlooking — timing, hidden motivations, and what you truly value.
careerTarot.revealDynamicsDesc: Understand the energies at play in your professional environment — team dynamics, management relationships, and office politics from a higher perspective.
careerTarot.revealDirectionDesc: Feeling stuck or uncertain about your path? A career reading can clarify what drives you professionally and whether your current trajectory aligns with it.
careerTarot.revealGrowthDesc: Identify skills to develop, strengths to leverage, and blind spots to address. The cards often reveal where your professional growth edge lies.
careerTarot.questionsTitle: Questions to Ask in a Career Reading
careerTarot.q1: What do I need to know about my current career path?
careerTarot.q2: What energy should I bring to this job interview/negotiation?
careerTarot.q3: What is blocking my professional growth right now?
careerTarot.q4: Is this the right time for a career change?
careerTarot.q5: What strengths am I underutilizing at work?
careerTarot.q6: What should I know before starting this business/project?
careerTarot.keyCardsDesc: These cards carry particularly strong professional significance when they appear in career-focused readings:
careerTarot.bestSpreadThreeCardDesc: Frame as Situation / Action / Outcome for specific career decisions. Quick, practical, and action-oriented.
careerTarot.bestSpreadCelticCrossDesc: For major career transitions. Ten cards reveal your aspirations, hidden fears, external pressures, and the likely trajectory.
careerTarot.sampleQuestion: Question: “What do I need to know about my current career path?”
careerTarot.sampleText: The Eight of Pentacles in your past shows someone who has been heads-down, mastering their craft — you have invested serious effort into building your skills. But The Hanged Man in your present suggests you have hit a plateau that effort alone cannot break through. This is not stagnation — it is a necessary pause for perspective. The Ace of Wands ahead signals a spark of new creative energy incoming. The pivot is not about working harder at what you are already doing. It is about channeling your established expertise in a new direction. Watch for an opportunity that excites you in a way your current work no longer does.
careerTarot.faqQ1: Can tarot help with career decisions?
careerTarot.faqA1: Tarot illuminates factors you may not be consciously considering — hidden fears, unacknowledged strengths, or environmental dynamics. It is a reflection tool, not a career counselor, but many people find it clarifies their thinking about professional decisions.
careerTarot.faqQ2: What tarot cards indicate career success?
careerTarot.faqA2: The Chariot (drive and victory), The Emperor (authority and structure), Three of Pentacles (skilled collaboration), and Ace of Pentacles (new opportunities) are traditionally strong indicators. But context matters — the AI reads them in relation to your specific question.
careerTarot.faqQ3: What is the best spread for career questions?
careerTarot.faqA3: A Three-Card Spread as Situation-Action-Outcome works for specific decisions. For major changes, the Celtic Cross provides a comprehensive multi-angle view including hidden influences and likely outcomes.
careerTarot.bottomCtaDesc: Get a free AI career tarot reading. Ask about your professional path, a job decision, or what the cards see ahead for your work life.

yesOrNo.metaTitle: Yes or No Tarot — Free AI Yes/No Tarot Reading
yesOrNo.metaDescription: Get a free yes or no tarot reading with AI interpretation. Ask a question, draw one card, and receive a clear answer with nuanced guidance from TarotVeil.
yesOrNo.ogTitle: Yes or No Tarot — Free AI Yes/No Tarot Reading | TarotVeil
yesOrNo.ogDescription: Quick yes or no tarot readings powered by AI. One card, one answer, with nuanced interpretation.
yesOrNo.heroDescription: Sometimes you need a straight answer. A yes or no tarot reading strips away complexity and gives you one card with one clear direction. But unlike a coin flip, the tarot adds context — the “yes” might come with a condition, and the “no” might reveal what needs to change first.
yesOrNo.step1Desc: Think of a specific yes/no question. "Should I take this job?" works better than "What should I do about work?" Keep it focused on one thing.
yesOrNo.step2Desc: A single card is drawn using cryptographic randomization — no algorithms influencing the result. Pure, unbiased chance.
yesOrNo.step3Desc: Upright cards generally lean yes. Reversed cards lean no. But the AI goes deeper, explaining the conditions, timing, and hidden factors behind the answer.
yesOrNo.yesNoNote: Most cards are contextual — the AI interprets yes/no based on position, reversal, and your specific question.
yesOrNo.beyondP1: The real power of tarot yes/no readings is not the binary answer — it is the nuance. A yes or no tarot card rarely says a flat “yes” or “no.” Instead, it might say:
yesOrNo.beyondYesButDesc: there is a condition to be aware of first.
yesOrNo.beyondNotYetDesc: the timing is not right, but the direction is favorable.
yesOrNo.beyondNoBecauseDesc: and here is what needs to change.
yesOrNo.beyondWrongQuestionDesc: you might be asking the wrong question entirely.
yesOrNo.beyondP2: This is where AI interpretation excels. Instead of a lookup table of yes/no answers, our AI reads the card in context of your specific question and explains what it actually means for your situation.
yesOrNo.sampleQuestion: Question: “Should I apply for this new position?”
yesOrNo.sampleText: Yes — but on the condition that this is genuinely the right fit, not just an escape from where you are now. Justice upright signals that the outcome will be fair: if you are qualified and this aligns with your values, the application will be judged on its merits. This card asks you to be honest with yourself about your motivations. If this role serves your genuine growth, apply with confidence. If you are running from something rather than toward something, Justice suggests addressing that first.
yesOrNo.tip1: Ask one question at a time. "Should I move AND change jobs?" is two questions — split them up.
yesOrNo.tip2: Avoid questions about other people's feelings or decisions. Focus on what you can control.
yesOrNo.tip3: Do not re-draw if you dislike the answer. The first card is the message.
yesOrNo.tip4: Use follow-up questions to explore the nuance. "What conditions does this yes come with?"
yesOrNo.tip5: If you need more depth than yes/no, try a three-card spread instead.
yesOrNo.relatedSingleCardDesc: The full guide to single card readings.
yesOrNo.relatedLoveTarotDesc: Readings focused on romance and relationships.
yesOrNo.faqQ1: How accurate is yes or no tarot?
yesOrNo.faqA1: Yes or no tarot is best understood as a decision-making tool, not a prediction method. It surfaces your subconscious leanings and highlights factors you may not have considered. Accuracy depends on the clarity of your question.
yesOrNo.faqQ2: Can I ask the same question twice?
yesOrNo.faqA2: Most tarot practitioners advise against re-drawing. The first card is the message. If uncertain, use a follow-up question to explore the nuance rather than re-asking.
yesOrNo.faqQ3: What does a reversed card mean?
yesOrNo.faqA3: Reversed cards generally lean toward "no" — but with nuance. A reversal often means "not yet," "not in this way," or "there is something to address first." Our AI explains the specific context for your question.
yesOrNo.bottomCtaDesc: Get a free yes or no tarot reading with AI-powered interpretation. One card, one answer, one clear direction.
